title: Gergamod
description: 4+ New mobs with stylistic quality and elevated gameplay mechanics refreshing the default game experience.
body:
Gergamod is a Forge mod that adds multiple new mobs to Minecraft. All of these mobs fall into either two categories: most of them are real world creatures, like Blue Lobsters, Hamsters, Birds, etc; but some of them are purely fictional, like the Mogue and Lobster Mutants. All of these creatures fulfill a necessary purpose, and either have unique drops, mechanics or functions, as there are no purely aesthetic creatures. That said, they also help make some environments in the game feel more alive. The models, textures, animations and AI are all stylistically compatible with the vanilla game's latest additions.

In addition to the new mobs, Gergamod adds unique tools and weapons to help you through your journey. With balanced gameplay elements and breathtaking art, these additions are perfect for anyone looking to spice up their experience.
